feature: Deep Gap Sprint 7 — Configuration Systems + History
requirement: History archive, post-trade params, tabular structures, client entity

tasks.title: History archive + post-trade params + tabular structures + client entity
tasks.description:
Implement 4 features in one task.

Part A — History orders/trades:
APPEND to types.go: HistoricalOrder and HistoricalTrade are just SecurityOrder and SecurityTrade with an ArchivedAt field added.
APPEND to store.go:
- HistoryStore interface: ArchiveOrder(*SecurityOrder), ArchiveTrade(*SecurityTrade), ListOrders(dateFrom, dateTo), ListTrades(dateFrom, dateTo) + InMemory
Create handlers_history.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/history/orders?date_from=&date_to= — list archived orders
- GET /api/v1/securities/history/trades?date_from=&date_to= — list archived trades
- POST /api/v1/securities/history/archive — trigger end-of-day archiving (move completed/cancelled orders and settled trades to history store)

Part B — Post-trade parameter entity:
APPEND to types.go: PostTradeParams struct (ID, InstrumentID, SettlementCycle string (T+0/T+1/T+2/T+3), ClearingFirmID, FeeScheduleID, PenaltyRatePct float64, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags)
APPEND to store.go: PostTradeParamsStore (Create, Get, GetByInstrument, Update, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_post_trade_params.go:
- POST/GET/GET{id}/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/securities/post-trade-params
- GET /api/v1/securities/post-trade-params/instrument/{instrument_id}
Wire into settlement: when processing settlement, look up PostTradeParams for instrument to get settlement cycle (T+N).

Part C — Tabular structures:
APPEND to types.go: ConfigTable struct (ID, TableType string, Name string, Rows []map[string]interface{}, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags)
TableType constants: TABLE_EXPIRY_CALENDAR, TABLE_STRIKE_INTERVAL, TABLE_REASON, TABLE_REFERENCE_PRICE, TABLE_SESSION_PARAMS, TABLE_EXCHANGE_RATE
APPEND to store.go: ConfigTableStore (Create, Get, ListByType, Update, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_config_table.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/config-tables (validate: table_type, name required)
- GET /api/v1/securities/config-tables?table_type=
- GET /api/v1/securities/config-tables/{id}
- PUT /api/v1/securities/config-tables/{id}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/config-tables/{id}

Part D — Client entity:
APPEND to types.go: Client struct (ID, FirmID, Name, Nationality, ClientType string RETAIL/INSTITUTIONAL, CreatedAt — json tags)
Add ClientID string field to SecurityOrder.
APPEND to store.go: ClientStore (Create, Get, ListByFirm, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_client.go:
- POST/GET/GET{id}/DELETE /api/v1/securities/clients
- GET /api/v1/securities/clients?firm_id=

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for Sprint 7
tasks.description:
Write tests.

1. store_test.go:
- TestHistoryStore_Archive_List — archive orders/trades, list by date range
- TestPostTradeParamsStore_CRUD
- TestConfigTableStore_Create_ListByType
- TestClientStore_CRUD

2. handlers_history_test.go:
- TestListHistoricalOrders → 200
- TestArchiveTrigger → 200, orders moved to history

3. handlers_post_trade_params_test.go:
- TestCreatePostTradeParams → 201
- TestGetByInstrument → 200

4. handlers_config_table_test.go:
- TestCreateConfigTable → 201
- TestListByType → filtered

5. handlers_client_test.go:
- TestCreateClient → 201
- TestListByFirm → filtered

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
